definitions: v. 楔入；嵌入（在此语境下指被紧紧卡在泥沙中）

examples.text: Yet some of Cape Canaveral’s most legendary attractions lie unseen, wedged under the sea’s surface in mud and sand, for this part of the world has a reputation as a deadly ship trap.
examples.explanation: wedge 在句中表示“楔入、卡住”。这里的 wedged 指一些著名的遗物沉在海面下，紧紧卡在泥沙之中。

reviewSessions.example_text: Yet some of Cape Canaveral’s most legendary attractions lie unseen, wedged under the sea’s surface in mud and sand, for this part of the world has a reputation as a deadly ship trap.
expected_definitions: v. 楔入；嵌入（在此语境下指被紧紧卡在泥沙中）
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了“楔入、卡住”的核心含义。
matched_points: 表达了“楔入/嵌入”的意思
与语境中“被紧紧卡在泥沙中”基本一致
